# VerifyAI Image Search

> VerifyAI is an iPhone reverse image search app for checking profile pictures, tracing image sources, and reviewing visual evidence before making an online trust decision.

## Product

- [Official website](https://verifyai.fork.work/)
- [Download VerifyAI on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/verifyai-image-search/id6754511420)
- Platform: iPhone, iOS 15.1 or later
- Search sources: Google, Yandex, Google Lens, and Shutterstock
- New users receive three complimentary full searches

VerifyAI searches public image indexes and organizes likely exact, cropped, stock-photo, and contextual matches. It provides source links so the user can review the evidence.

VerifyAI cannot guarantee a person's identity, prove that an account is genuine, or perfectly classify an AI-generated image. No result may mean that an image is new, private, altered, low quality, or not indexed.

## Guides

- [How to reverse image search on iPhone](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/reverse-image-search-iphone/)
- [How to find the original source of an image](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/find-image-source/)
- [How to check if a profile picture is fake](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/check-fake-profile-photo/)
- [Reverse image search for catfish checks](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/reverse-image-search-catfish/)
- [How to spot photos used in romance scams](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/spot-romance-scam-photos/)
- [A multi-engine Google Lens alternative for iPhone](https://verifyai.fork.work/guides/google-lens-alternative-iphone/)
